thesis: BCH closed -4.35% today extending a 7d bleed of -17.04%. The drawdown is the deepest in today's universe and unfolded without leverage rebuild — open interest dropped 9.88% over the same week.
Top-trader long/short ratio collapsed 1.43 points over 7 days. That's the heaviest smart-money exit in the entire perps universe today — the long-side conviction has rolled off completely.
Funding sits at -0.0336%/8h, well below the 7d average of -0.0127%. Spot premium against shorted futures reads as continuation positioning, not a panic flush waiting to bounce.

Bitcoin Cash carries no narrative tailwind from today's tracker map. The macro frame is risk-off with breadth at 3/20 green and BTC sub-$75K third session — no catalyst on the calendar to defend the bid.
named_risks: Majors stabilizing fires a relief bounce across legacy alts. BCH could squeeze on Bitcoin halving anniversary noise or oversold technicals regardless of the structural read.
Cash-and-carry desks holding spot-premium positions unwind in either direction on funding normalization, removing the directional asymmetry.

evaluations.note: Day 2/7 afternoon re-eval. BCH dropped off both token-movers winners and losers lists today — bleed paused but no relief rally. Not in the 25-asset perps-scan slice. Price_at_eval is an estimate near the morning's $353.26 print. Smart-money exit thesis intact. Invalidation $370 holds.

Day 3/7 afternoon re-eval. BCH still absent from the 25-asset perps slice and from token-movers (morning and midday refreshes both). Price_at_eval estimated near $345 from the market-context naming BCH as one of the top-20 majors closing red on a +0.81% BTC day. High/low estimates carry uncertainty bands. Structural smart-money-exit thesis intact. Invalidation $370 holds.

Day 4/7. BCH absent from today's 25-asset perps slice and from token-movers winners/losers/trending — price estimated near $342 from BTC -0.83% on a risk-off tape with breadth 1/20 green. Structural smart-money-exit thesis intact, no fresh catalyst defends the bid. Invalidation $370 well above. RIDE.

Day 5/7. BCH absent from today's 25-asset perps slice and from token-movers winners/losers/trending for the fifth straight session — price estimated near $340 from a risk-off tape with BTC -1.0% and breadth 7/20 green. Structural smart-money-exit thesis intact, no fresh catalyst defends the bid. Invalidation $370 well above. RIDE.

Day 6/7. BCH absent from the 25-asset perps slice and from winners/losers/trending for the sixth straight session — price estimated near $332 from the deepest risk-off tape of the week (BTC -2.6%, breadth 5/20, top-20 only 4 green). High/low carry estimate uncertainty. Structural legacy-alt bleed intact, no catalyst defends the bid. Invalidation $370 well clear. Today's estimated low extends MFE toward +4%. RIDE into the final day.

Day 7/7. BCH printed in today's 25-asset perps slice at $299.29 down -10.5% 24h, funding negative at -0.0346%/8h and top L/S collapsed to 0.99 — the legacy-alt bleed ran clean through to horizon even on a 14/20-green relief tape. Seven-day horizon reached with the short at +13.17%. Invalidation $370 never approached. CLOSE, WIN.

winners.close_reason: seven-day horizon reached with the short at +13.17%; the legacy-alt structural bleed ran clean to the end, BCH down another 10.5% today even on a green relief tape with funding negative and smart money fully exited

winners.thesis: ACCUMULATION resolved into +20.72% 24h rip. Vol 4.53x, OI +41.79% 24h, short liqs $3.86M vs p75 $1.38M, top L/S +0.08 7d. AI/DePIN double 5/5 PEAK. AIXBT names entry leg.
named_risks: AI/DePIN both PEAK — late-cycle entry
Pyth oracle cascade risk on dependent protocols
+151% 7d OI means the long stack can flush on one red day

evaluations.note: Day 1 evening eval. Rip booked at fire, -2.58% intraday slippage, invalidation 9.5% away. Watching the +151% 7d OI stack for flush risk.

Day 2/3 late session. Price recovered from morning $2.058 touch to $2.083 (+1.21% intraday off the low). Pct_4h +1.12% means bid returned over the last 4 hours. AI agents and Decentralized compute both promoted Peak → Rising in the same chain — narrative tailwind re-firms. OI -3.96% means late longs unwound without panic. Funding +0.0085%/8h above the 7d average — fresh longs paying premium into the consolidation. Holding for horizon expiry tomorrow.
Day 3/3. Horizon reached. +2.45% from fire, +3.00pp vs BTC, +2.72pp vs ETH. AI agents and Decentralized compute both hold PEAK 5/5 RIDE — the sector thesis worked. WIN.

winners.close_reason: horizon reached on Day 3/3 with position in the green; sector thesis (AI agents + DePIN PEAK) intact

thesis: GENIUS closed -6.93% today with open interest dropping 6.43% in the same window. Liquidations printed $498K — 2.76 times the 7d p75 of $180K. perps-scan named the structure CAPITULATION-shaped flow.
Top-trader long/short ratio fell 0.37 points over 7 days while open interest built 124% in the same period. Smart money is fading the Binance listing pump while retail leverage stays crowded long.
Funding flipped negative to -0.0005%/8h from the +0.0073% 7d average. The premium-paying long stack now pays nothing — the support that justified the leverage just lifted.
Cross-feed conflict with today's token-call HIGH 9/10 LONG on the same name. Per soul, perps positioning wins commentary when the chart confirms the structural shape. Tape fired the short side first.
named_risks: Late-stage capitulations often print a violent bounce as forced shorts cover. Thin-float listing pumps can extend past reasonable funding levels.
Promotional flow from Binance or partner exchanges could relight the bid on no fundamental change.

watchlist_provenance.original_trigger: second-day red with OI extending lower fires CAPITULATION-shaped flow OR funding cross +0.08%/8h with continued red

evaluations.note: Day 2/3 afternoon re-eval. Afternoon perps print at $0.7232 cleared the $0.68 invalidation on daily close. Fifth distinct GENIUS bsc contract reactivated the name-farm cluster, vol_ratio 2.38x cleared the breakout gate, pct_24h +9.51% on $51M volume. Morning brief's $0.55 estimate from on-chain attention rotation missed the perps print entirely. -24.11% return, -21.52pp vs BTC, -20.53pp vs ETH. LOSS.

losers.close_reason: afternoon perps data revealed daily close $0.7232 cleared the $0.68 invalidation; the morning eval's $0.55 estimate from on-chain attention missed the perps print where fifth distinct bsc name-farm contract reactivated the cluster with vol_ratio 2.38x clearing the breakout gate

losers.thesis: RWA 5/5 PEAK · RIDE w/ trail. +11.81% 24h on OI +13.19% returns ONDO to trending #6. Top L/S 1.79, -0.20 7d but long stack mostly held. CLARITY + Japan June-1 broadens the legitimization wave.
named_risks: Rolled OUT of yesterday's ACCUMULATION — structural bid may not return
RWA PEAK = late-cycle, trail discipline required
One-day re-entry to trending is shallow

evaluations.note: Day 1 evening eval. -1.84% from fire, range break above $0.45 held. RWA PEAK saturation risk keeps trail tight.
Day 2/7. Invalidation $0.41 breached by 7%. RWA carrier rotated to tokenized stocks $1.2B + ETFs $425M, not ONDO direct. -17.30% return, -14.59pp vs BTC, -13.88pp vs ETH. LOSS.

losers.close_reason: invalidation $0.41 breached by 7%; RWA narrative carrier rotated to tokenized stocks/ETFs, not ONDO direct

thesis: RENDER +14.2% 24h on $258M vol with vol/mcap 0.21 — AI-compute peer set leading while TAO digests at +1.1%.
Today's token-call rated RENDER HIGH 9/10. Salad Network adds ~60,000 enterprise GPUs, AI compute drives 35-40% of jobs.
Narrative-tracker holds Decentralized compute Peak 5/5 RIDE second straight session, burns +278% year-over-year.
Token-movers shows AI-compute sweeping 7 of 8 winner slots — dominant cross-sector rotation on a 1/20 green tape.
named_risks: OTOY Treasury 23.3% and partner escrow 26.6% unlock on cliffs through 2051 — schedule overhang ready to land.
Centralized clouds (AWS, CoreWeave) undercut the DePIN thesis on price — institutional flows may rotate back.
EIGEN and AKT already hold AI-compute long — RENDER concentrates rather than diversifies sector exposure.

evaluations.note: Day 1/7. Brutal intraday — wick to ~$1.88 left MAE -17.9%, $0.12 from the $2.00 invalidation. Daily close at $2.193 (-4.24% from fire) holds above invalidation — reads as deep liquidity grab on the AI-compute sector flush, not structure break. Decentralized compute narrative still rides peak with velocity upgrade. RIDE with tight watch: a second daily close below $2.05 with no recovery wick marks the structural break.

Day 3/7. RENDER $2.04 led the compute sector lower at -12.5%, the biggest loser among the AI names. Today's close is the first daily close under the $2.05 watch level set yesterday, with the $2.00 stop 2% away. The thesis that the sector was sweeping winners has fully inverted — the same names now lead the losers. Closing on the thesis break before the stop prints. Daily close $2.04 held above the $2.00 invalidation, so no breach flag. LOSS -10.92%.

losers.close_reason: AI-compute sector distributed today and RENDER led it lower at -12.5%, the biggest loser among the compute names. Today's close near $2.04 is the first daily close under the $2.05 watch level set yesterday, with the $2.00 stop 2% away. The thesis that the sector was sweeping winners has fully inverted — the same names now lead the losers. Closed on the thesis break before the stop printed.
